hero.title: Building web products that are fast, clean, and scalable
hero.subtitle: I'm Ahmad Na'im, a fullstack web developer based in Yogyakarta. Available for remote work—company profiles, dashboards, and data-driven apps.

story.paragraph: I'm a fullstack web developer who builds end-to-end web products—from clean UI and smooth interactions to reliable backend systems. I've worked on company profiles, dashboards/admin panels, and data-driven apps. My goal is simple: ship fast, keep it maintainable, and make it feel professional in production.
story.quote: "Good UI is obvious. Great engineering is invisible."

services.title: Services.
services.description: End-to-end delivery for web products: modern UI, reliable backend, and production-ready deployments.
services.webDevDesc: Build websites and web apps end-to-end—auth, dashboards, admin panels, and API integrations.
services.uiUxDesc: Modern, responsive UI with accessibility and performance in mind.
services.backendDesc: REST APIs, database design, query optimization, and maintainable backend architecture.
services.deploymentDesc: Deployment to hosting/cloud, environment setup, basic monitoring, and post-launch maintenance.
services.chatbotDesc: AI chatbot integration for WhatsApp, Instagram, or website — automated 24/7 customer responses without manual standby.
services.paymentDesc: Online payment system integration (Midtrans, Xendit, etc.) directly into your website or online store — smoother customer transactions.

portfolio.title: Featured Projects
portfolio.description: Selected projects — focused on clean UI, clear user flow, and production-ready implementations.
portfolio.airaDesc: Helped Aira Dry Cleaning move from manual record-keeping to an online booking system — customers can now check pricing, pickup/delivery schedules, and location without messaging first.
portfolio.scholarifyDesc: A company profile website and an SNBT tryout platform with professional data analysis to support evaluation and decision-making.

testimonials.title: Kind words from people I've worked with
testimonials.description: A few words from clients, teammates, and collaborators.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.card1Subtitle: Perfect for SMEs just starting online
pricing.card2Subtitle: For established businesses wanting a more professional presence
pricing.card3Subtitle: For businesses going full digital — integrated website, AI chatbot, and payment gateway
pricing.disclaimer: *Pricing may vary based on project complexity
